$description: Bottke Clinical Design System — Brand Kit B (oxblood). Single source of truth for the Inpatient Antibiotic Guide. CSS custom-property names are the leaf keys verbatim (e.g. `ox-deep` -> `--ox-deep`); the build emits them all onto `:root`. Previously these values were duplicated inline on `.rx-root` and `.sx-root`; this file unifies them.

paper.$description: Wave 7 W7-B · cooled from #FBFAF8 (warm cream) to #FAFAFC (pure neutral with the faintest cool tint). Removes the puke-yellow undertone the previous warm paper carried under oxblood.

paper2.$description: Inset / chip background — cool-tint neutral, replaces warm cream.

ink.$description: Wave 7 W7-B · deepened from #1B1916 to near-black for editorial weight.

line.$description: Wave 7 W7-B · cool-neutral hairline (replaces warm tan #E6E0D8).

oxblood.$description: Wave 7 W7-B · REPAINTED. Variable names kept as the universal accent contract (59 components, 196 occurrences); values now resolve to editorial graphite + true neon cyan. `--ox` = deep graphite (12:1 on paper). `--ox-bright` = true #00D4FF neon cyan (decorative role). `--ox-soft`/`-softer`/`-line` = cyan-tinted washes + borders. One token swap flips the entire surface off oxblood maroon.

ox.$description: Primary accent — deep graphite/slate. Modern editorial, 12:1 on paper.

ox-bright.$description: Hover / active / decorative — true neon cyan.

ox-soft.$description: Tinted callout bg — soft cyan wash.

amber.$description: Wave 7 W7-B · repointed from muddy #8A5A12 to crisp electric amber. Used everywhere via `var(--amber)` — the trigger / caution semantic channel.

red.$description: Required / hard-stop severity. Wave 5 CL-1 — these were previously hardcoded inline (#b91c1c + rgba 185/28/28) across MonitoringBlock / DiagnosticsBlock / OPATBlock / RegimenOptions microbiome chips. Promoted to tokens so any future palette tweak ripples in one place and the severity grammar reads from the same source as everything else.

overlay.$description: Modal scrim color. Wave 5 CL-1 — previously inline across MechanismDrawer + DecisionAttributionDrawer.

green.$description: Wave 7 W7-B · brighter, cleaner green. Modern positive, not 'clinic mossy green'.

blue.$description: Wave 7 W7-B · saturated electric blue. Modern info, not 'navy banker blue'.

supergroup.$description: Taxonomic supergroup tints for the spectrum matrix — pale, categorical, never the data channel.

decision.$description: Semantic decision-channel tokens for the Bedside answer canvas. Each state is a triple (text · bg · border) for tags, chips, and dose rows that need to read as a clinical action at a glance. Values alias the existing palette so the decision channel stays inside the Brand Kit B grammar.

decision-adjusted.$description: Adjusted from standard — renal, weight, or substitution.

decision-pending.$description: Awaiting data — culture pending, susceptibility unknown.

semantic.$description: Wave 6 W6-B · semantic accent palette. Three triples (text · soft bg · line) for clinical content channels that benefit from a non-oxblood tint without crowding the severity grammar (required / trigger / consider) the answer canvas already uses.

neon.$description: Wave 7 · electric accent family. One TRUE neon at a time — the cyan is the primary 'look-here' color, the others are reserved for semantic channels and decorative moments. All values verified ≥ 4.5:1 on the paper canvas.

neon-cyan.$description: Primary accent — replaces oxblood as the everywhere 'look-here' color.

neon-cyan-soft.$description: Soft cyan wash for tinted backgrounds + chip fills.

neon-cyan-glow.$description: Halo glow for primary-CTA focus states.

vivid-red.$description: Required severity. Saturated coral, NOT maroon.

electric-lime.$description: Stable / positive / IV→PO eligibility. Reads as 'go' without the medical-clinic green.

hot-magenta.$description: Special / edge-case accent. Reserved for moments.

charcoal.$description: Wave 7 · deep canvas tones for accent panels + future dark-mode surface.
Deepest canvas. Header chrome, primary CTA bg, future dark-mode page.

charcoal-2.$description: One step up — cards on a dark surface.

charcoal-3.$description: Hover state for dark surfaces; alt cards.

mesh.$description: Wave 7 · gradient-mesh anchor stops for the GradientMeshHero + ambient backgrounds. Used by radial-gradient compositions to paint soft electric halos.

chrome.$description: Wave 9 W9 · chrome / mercury / gloss vocabulary for the frosted-glass surface family. `steel-*` triple drives the chrome CTA gradient (light highlight, mid ridge, dark base). `gloss-top` is the iOS-icon top-edge wash. `mercury-ripple-*` are low-alpha radial-gradient stops that drift across modal backdrops for the liquid-mercury feel.

steel-light.$description: Chrome CTA highlight band — the light catching on the sheen ridge.

steel-mid.$description: Chrome CTA midtone — body of the metallic gradient.

steel-dark.$description: Chrome CTA shadow — base of the metallic gradient.

gloss-top.$description: Top-edge gloss highlight — gradient white→transparent for the iOS icon shine.

shadow.$description: Elevation shadows. Wave 5 CL-1 — drawer shadow; Wave 6 W6-B — an explicit elevation scale so depth feels layered rather than flat. Match Apple/Material conventions: progressively softer + larger as elevation rises. Wave 9 W9 adds e4–e7 with progressively richer cyan tinting so the highest elevations carry an outer halo, matching the chrome/iridescent surface family.

shadow-e0.$description: Hairline — barely perceptible separation; chips at rest.

shadow-e1.$description: Wave 7 W7-B — visible card presence at rest (lifted from 0.04/0.06 to 0.05/0.06 + 6px blur).

shadow-e2.$description: Wave 7 W7-B — visibly raised hover state.

shadow-e4.$description: Wave 9 W9 — first elevation that picks up a faint cyan tint; modal drawers + lifted panels.

shadow-e5.$description: Wave 9 W9 — deeper drop with stronger cyan wash; popover / drawer roots.

shadow-e6.$description: Wave 9 W9 — mercury-backed modal cards; near-max elevation.

shadow-e7.$description: Wave 9 W9 — max elevation, carries an outer cyan halo for the highest-elevation cards.

shadow-glow-ox.$description: Wave 7 W7-B — repointed to neon cyan with outer halo.

motion.$description: Wave 6 W6-B motion vocabulary. Three durations + two eases. Keep transitions short and tactile (Apple ~120-220ms); reserve the longer 320ms for full-screen mode changes. The reduced-motion media rule in app-styles.js collapses every duration to ~0.01ms when the OS preference asks for it.

duration-fast.$description: Chip hover, button press, focus ring fade-in.

duration-base.$description: Card lift, drawer slide-in, tab switch.

ease-out.$description: Default — calm settle. Aliased on iOS as 'easeOutExpo'.

ease-in-out.$description: Symmetric in-out for elements that arrive and depart.

space.$description: Wave 6 W6-B density grid. Single source of truth for every block's outer padding + section gap. The 'perfect point between two sentences and overwhelming' the user described lands when every block respects the same vertical rhythm.

block-pad.$description: Default block outer padding (every Section uses this).

block-gap.$description: Default vertical gap between siblings in a stack.

block-gap-tight.$description: Compact gap for list items inside a block.
